ea_dispatch.phase_name: Stage 6 Items 6.4 + 6.5 — pyproject.toml Finalization and BlarAI Docs Sweep

comprehension_gate.rule: Present sections CG1–CG8 as your first and ONLY output. Do NOT begin work. Do NOT call any tools. Do NOT modify any file. Await an explicit APPROVED or APPROVED_WITH_ADJUSTMENTS verdict from Guide-#10. If verdict is REJECTED or contains binding adjustments, apply them before proceeding.

required_sections.section: Describe Phase 2 in 3–5 sentences: - What Stage 6 spec items 6.4 and 6.5 require (not spec-quoted verbatim; your interpretation). - That 6.1 / 6.2 / 6.3 / 6.6 are DEFERRED per 6.1.v2 and are NOT in scope for this phase. - That the 37-ticket hardening backlog in Project 10 is NOT the source of Phase 2 work; no hardening-backlog closes in Phase 2. - That a Phase 2 tracking task will be created in Vikunja Project 10 at start (before pause).

For each check, state what you expect to observe and what constitutes a PASS vs HARD STOP:
Check 0a — .platform/ directory contents: Expected: exactly 2 entries — audit_archive/ and vikunja_project_ids.yaml. Any count other than 2 → HARD STOP; report to Guide-#10 before proceeding.
Check 0b — 3 platform-extraction git tags: Expected: pre-platform-extract, post-platform-extract, platform-extracted all present in BlarAI repo. Any missing → HARD STOP.
Check 0c — Working tree state: BlarAI main expected at 73a03f9 (Phase 1 BlarAI commit). Any commit hash other than this on BlarAI main → HARD STOP; report to Guide-#10. devplatform main expected at 4b82cf3 (Phase 1 unpause commit). Any other hash → HARD STOP. BlarAI working tree: 9 .claude/agents/*.md files with ' D' status (unstaged deletions) — EXPECTED; LA WIP; untouched throughout Phase 2. devplatform working tree: 2 stale flag files (critical_pending.flag + vikunja_down.flag) in tools/fleet_observability/ — EXPECTED; untouched throughout Phase 2.
Check 0d — Fleet pause state: Expected: fleet_paused=false in devplatform/tools/autonomy_budget/state.json at boot. fleet_paused=true at boot → HARD STOP; investigate before proceeding.

State the exact edit to devplatform/pyproject.toml: - Read the file first. Confirm no placeholder comments, TODOs, or obviously provisional lines beyond what is already known (version=0.1.0, description already present). - The only anticipated addition: an `authors` field in the [project] block, inserted after the `description` line: authors = [ {name = "Blair", email = "mr.blair.do@gmail.com"}, ] - If the file already has an authors field: note it in the gate response and mark 6.4 as already satisfied; no edit needed. - If other placeholder bits are found that were NOT anticipated here: enumerate them in the gate response; do NOT modify them without Guide-#10 authorization. - Confirm: no other pyproject.toml sections will be added, removed, or reordered.

State the exact sweep command and your interpretation of results:
Command: Get-ChildItem C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI\docs -File | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "CLAUDE_|CO_LEAD_|DEC[0-9]+|DOMAIN[0-9]|FLEET_|COWORK" }
Expected result: empty (no output).
If output is empty: PASS — record in STATUS.md, no file relocations needed. If output is non-empty: HARD STOP — list every matched filename in close report to Guide-#10; do NOT relocate any file without explicit Guide-#10 disposition per file.
Note: the sweep is read-only. No BlarAI/docs/ file is touched in Phase 2 unless a non-empty sweep result triggers Guide-#10 relocation disposition (which would require a new dispatch addendum before execution).

section.title: Commit plan (4 commits, files per commit, exact messages)

required_sections.section:
List all 4 commits in execution order:
Commit 1 — devplatform main (Pre-Flight Step 1): Files: tools/autonomy_budget/state.json (pause_fleet output) Message: chore(ops): pause fleet -- Stage 6 Phase 2 items 6.4+6.5 -- EA-11 Staged via: git add tools/autonomy_budget/state.json
Commit 2 — devplatform main (Item 6.4): Files: pyproject.toml (authors field added) Message: feat(project): finalize pyproject.toml -- add authors field (Stage 6 Item 6.4) Staged via: git add pyproject.toml
Commit 3 — BlarAI main (STATUS.md): Files: docs/platform_separation/STATUS.md (E10 evolution entry + Stage 6 table update) Message: docs(stage6_phase2): record Items 6.4+6.5 complete in STATUS.md (E10) Staged via: git add docs/platform_separation/STATUS.md
Commit 4 — devplatform main (Post-Flight Step): Files: tools/autonomy_budget/state.json (resume_fleet output) Message: chore(ops): unpause fleet -- Stage 6 Phase 2 items 6.4+6.5 -- EA-11 done Staged via: git add tools/autonomy_budget/state.json
No other files. No git add . or git add -A anywhere. Commit 2 omitted only if 6.4 is already satisfied (authors field pre-existing). Commit 3 omitted only if 6.5 sweep is non-empty and Phase 2 halts pending disposition (close report is emitted instead; STATUS.md not updated until disposition resolved).

Acknowledge: mcp__vikunja__complete_task is PERMANENTLY SUSPENDED in Phase 2. Vikunja A33 data-loss bug: complete_task sends only {"done": True}; Vikunja backend zeroes absent fields (description="", priority=0). Fix tracked at Ticket WW (id 318). All closes (Phase 2 tracking task + any incidental closes) use Option B: 1. get_task(task_id) — capture title, description, priority. 2. update_task(task_id, title=t, description=d, priority=p, done=True). Both title and done=True MUST be explicit in every update_task close call.

Acknowledge the following artifacts are UNTOUCHED throughout Phase 2: - BlarAI working tree: 9 .claude/agents/*.md files with ' D' status (unstaged deletions). These are LA's WIP. Explicit-add discipline ensures they are never staged. - devplatform working tree: critical_pending.flag + vikunja_down.flag in tools/fleet_observability/ — stale 2026-05-04 Vikunja-down artifacts. Untracked; safe. Neither set of artifacts requires any remediation action by EA-11.
Confirm each ack by label (g10-ea11_n1 through g10-ea11_n9) with one sentence each. See §5 Required Acks for the full text.

context.inheritance: Cumulative binding-atom chain: 132 atoms through Stage 5 close. Phase 1 (EA-10) acks in g10-ea10_n* namespace do NOT add to the 132-atom count per the no-amend doctrine (dn30); they are Phase-local binding constraints. Phase 2 acks use namespace g10-ea11_n* (Guide-#10, EA instance 11).
context.repo_state:
BlarAI main HEAD: 73a03f9 Commit: "docs(stage6_phase1): A32+A33 anomaly entries + CLAUDE.md Defunct label inventory addition" Authored: 2026-05-07 (EA-10 Phase 1 BlarAI commit)
devplatform main HEAD: 4b82cf3 Commit: "chore(ops): unpause fleet -- Stage 6 Phase 1 quick-wins batch -- EA-10 done" Authored: 2026-05-07 (EA-10 Phase 1 Post-Flight)
Fleet state: unpaused (fleet_paused=false, last_updated_utc=2026-05-07T20:05:56Z)
context.vikunja_state: Project 10 (DevPlatform-Meta) at Phase 2 dispatch: Total: 37 | Done: 13 | Open: 24 | High-priority open: 4 High-priority open (priority=3): A(282), X(289), II(299), VV(317) Phase 2 does NOT close any of these 24 hardening backlog tickets. Phase 2 Vikunja activity: create 1 tracking task (Phase 2 start) + close it (Phase 2 end).
context.platform_geometry: .platform/ directory (BlarAI repo, correct post-E8 state): audit_archive/ — preserved, untouched vikunja_project_ids.yaml — preserved, untouched docs/active_tasks.yaml — lives at BlarAI/docs/ post-E8 (NOT .platform/) docs/sprints/ — lives at BlarAI/docs/ post-E8 (NOT .platform/)
context.deferred_items: Per 6.1.v2 (LA directive 2026-04-24): Items 6.1, 6.2, 6.3, 6.6 are DEFERRED. Doctrine splits (CLAUDE.md, copilot-instructions.md, AGENTS.md) await a separate explicitly-approved session. EA-11 does NOT touch these items. 24h soak (Item 6.7): DEFERRED — LA accepted 45-min baseline at E2 (dn31 prohibition). Item 6.8 (fleet handoff), 6.9 (archive), 6.10 (final STATUS.md close): future phases.
context.anomaly_A33_standing_workaround: complete_task MCP tool is SUSPENDED until Ticket WW (id 318) is resolved. All ticket closes in Phase 2 and all subsequent phases use Option B: step 1: get_task(task_id) → capture title, description, priority step 2: update_task(task_id, title=t, description=d, priority=p, done=True) done=True MUST be explicit (Go zero-value=false would reopen the ticket). title MUST be explicit (required field; omitting creates a silent empty-title).

step.name: 4-check verification
step.timing: Before any tool call or file edit
step.instruction: Run each check in order. Report all 4 results in the gate response. HARD STOP on any unexpected FAIL unless a prior Guide-#10 disposition has waived it.

check.label: .platform/ contents
check.on_unexpected: HARD STOP. Report actual contents to Guide-#10.

check.label: 3 platform-extraction git tags
check.on_unexpected: HARD STOP. Report missing tags to Guide-#10.

check.label: Repo HEADs and working tree
check.expected: BlarAI HEAD: 73a03f9 devplatform HEAD: 4b82cf3 BlarAI working tree: only the 9 .claude/agents/*.md ' D' lines (unstaged deletions) — no other modifications or staged changes. devplatform working tree: only the 2 untracked flag files — no staged changes.
check.on_unexpected: HEAD mismatch on either repo → HARD STOP; report actual HEAD to Guide-#10. Unexpected staged changes → HARD STOP; report diff to Guide-#10. Additional untracked files beyond the 2 known flags → note them; not a HARD STOP unless they are in paths that Phase 2 commits touch.

check.label: Fleet pause state
check.command: Get-Content C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform\tools\autonomy_budget\state.json | ConvertFrom-Json | Select fleet_paused, fleet_paused_reason, last_updated_utc
check.on_unexpected: fleet_paused=true at boot → HARD STOP; investigate before proceeding.

step.name: Create Phase 2 Vikunja tracking task
step.instruction: Create a tracking task in Project 10 (DevPlatform-Meta) before pausing the fleet. Vikunja mutations are NOT gated by fleet_paused state.
step.task_spec: title: "Stage 6 Phase 2: pyproject.toml finalization + docs sweep (Items 6.4+6.5)" project_id: 10 priority: 2 (MEDIUM) description: "EA-11 Phase 2 execution. Items in scope: 6.4 (devplatform pyproject.toml — add authors field; confirm no placeholder bits), 6.5 (BlarAI/docs/ platform-layer sweep — expected empty). Items 6.1/6.2/6.3/6.6 DEFERRED per 6.1.v2. Commits: pause + 6.4 edit + STATUS.md E10 + unpause. Reference: docs/platform_separation/07_STAGE6_HARDENING.xml items 6.4–6.5." labels_to_apply_after_create: [id 1 Active, id 5 Infrastructure]
step.note: Capture the created task's Vikunja ID immediately. All subsequent comments and the final close reference this ID. If create_task fails with a connection error, stop and report before proceeding — do not skip tracking.

step.name: Pause fleet
step.timing: After Step 0.5, before any file edit
step.command: python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, r'C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform'); from tools.autonomy_budget import state; state.pause_fleet('Stage 6 Phase 2 items 6.4+6.5 -- EA-11', updated_by='ea_code', path='C:/Users/mrbla/devplatform/tools/autonomy_budget/state.json')"
step.verify: fleet_paused=True, fleet_paused_reason="Stage 6 Phase 2 items 6.4+6.5 -- EA-11", last_updated_by=ea_code

commit.message: chore(ops): pause fleet -- Stage 6 Phase 2 items 6.4+6.5 -- EA-11
commit.constraint: git add tools/autonomy_budget/state.json — no other files

step.on_failure: If pause_fleet() raises AttributeError or ImportError, use manual fallback: edit state.json directly (set fleet_paused=true, fleet_paused_reason="Stage 6 Phase 2 -- EA-11", last_updated_by="ea_code", last_updated_utc=current UTC ISO 8601 Z). Commit. Report the fallback in the close report.

item.name: Finalize devplatform pyproject.toml
item.description: Remove any placeholder bits from Stage 1.7 / Stage 3.4. Add proper version, description, author. "version" (0.1.0) and "description" are already present in the current file. The anticipated missing element is the `authors` field.

execution_steps.step: Scan for any TODO comments, PLACEHOLDER markers, provisional version strings, or obviously incomplete stubs. If found beyond what this dispatch anticipates: enumerate in close report, do NOT edit without Guide-#10 authorization.
If authors field is absent: add it immediately after the description line in [project]: authors = [ {name = "Blair", email = "mr.blair.do@gmail.com"}, ]
If authors field is already present: note it; no edit. Mark 6.4 as pre-satisfied. Skip commit 2.
Do NOT add [project.urls], license, readme, or any other PEP 621 fields not explicitly enumerated in this dispatch.
After edit: read the file back to verify the diff is exactly the authors addition and nothing else changed.

commit.message: feat(project): finalize pyproject.toml -- add authors field (Stage 6 Item 6.4)
commit.constraint: git add pyproject.toml — no other files. Verify git diff --staged before commit.
commit.skip_condition: Omit this commit if 6.4 was pre-satisfied (authors already present).

item.add_vikunja_comment: Add a comment to the Phase 2 tracking task after commit 2 (or after 6.4 pre-satisfied determination): "Item 6.4 complete. pyproject.toml authors field added (devplatform commit <SHA>). [OR: 6.4 pre-satisfied — authors field already present; no edit needed.]"

item.name: BlarAI docs/ platform-layer sweep
item.description: Sweep BlarAI/docs/ for any platform-layer doctrine files that were missed in Stage 3.2 or Stage 5.5 cleanup. Expected result: empty (all such files were migrated in earlier stages).

execution_steps.step: If empty (no output): PASS. Record in STATUS.md update (E10 entry). Proceed to STATUS.md commit.

If non-empty: HARD STOP. Do NOT relocate any file. List every matched filename in close report to Guide-#10 with full path and file size. Await disposition per-file before any relocation. STATUS.md commit is deferred until disposition resolves.

item.note: The sweep is pattern-based and conservative. The pattern CLAUDE_|CO_LEAD_|DEC[0-9]+|DOMAIN[0-9]|FLEET_|COWORK matches exactly the patterns prescribed in the Stage 6 spec. EA-11 does NOT expand or narrow this pattern without Guide-#10 authorization. Platform-separation tracking files (platform_separation/, STATUS.md, GUIDE_HANDOFF_LATEST.xml, 07_STAGE6_HARDENING.xml, etc.) are legitimately in BlarAI/docs/ and are NOT subject to the sweep — they are BlarAI audit artifacts, not platform-doctrine files.
item.add_vikunja_comment: Add a comment to the Phase 2 tracking task after sweep execution: "Item 6.5 sweep complete. Result: PASS (empty — no platform-layer files found in BlarAI/docs/). [OR: HARD STOP — N files found: <list>. Awaiting Guide-#10 disposition.]"

item.name: STATUS.md E10 evolution entry
item.description: Update BlarAI/docs/platform_separation/STATUS.md to record Phase 2 completion. Two changes in a single edit: (a) Stage 6 table row — update the Status column and Key Evidence column. (b) §11 Post-Stage-5-close evolution — append E10 entry after E9.

change.location: Stage 6 table row (near top of file, §2 progress table)

edit_spec.change: Current: | 6 Hardening | PENDING | | | | Doctrine split, 24h soak passed | New: | 6 Hardening | IN-PROGRESS | | devplatform <6.4-commit-SHA> | BlarAI <this-commit-SHA> | Items 6.4+6.5 complete; 6.1-6.3/6.6 DEFERRED per 6.1.v2; 6.7-6.10 pending | Note: use the actual commit SHAs once known. devplatform 6.4 commit SHA from commit 2. BlarAI commit SHA = this commit (commit 3). If 6.4 was pre-satisfied, devplatform column references pause commit SHA (commit 1) as the operative devplatform touch for Phase 2.

Append:
**E10 — Stage 6 Phase 2 (Items 6.4+6.5) complete** (devplatform commits <pause-SHA> [+ <6.4-SHA>], BlarAI commit <STATUS-SHA>, 2026-MM-DD): Item 6.4 — devplatform/pyproject.toml finalized: `authors` field added ({name="Blair", email="mr.blair.do@gmail.com"}). [OR: 6.4 pre-satisfied — authors field was already present.] Item 6.5 — BlarAI/docs/ platform-layer sweep: PASS (empty, no files matching CLAUDE_|CO_LEAD_|DEC[0-9]+|DOMAIN[0-9]|FLEET_|COWORK found). Hardening backlog unchanged: 37 total / 13 done / 24 open.

commit.message: docs(stage6_phase2): record Items 6.4+6.5 complete in STATUS.md (E10)
commit.constraint: git add docs/platform_separation/STATUS.md — no other files. No CLAUDE.md edits.
commit.skip_condition: Omit only if 6.5 sweep returned non-empty (HARD STOP path); emit close report instead with HARD STOP details for Guide-#10 disposition.

required_acks.ack: BlarAI main HEAD is 73a03f9 and devplatform main HEAD is 4b82cf3 at Phase 2 boot. Any deviation → HARD STOP; report actual HEAD to Guide-#10 before any action.
.platform/ directory in BlarAI repo contains exactly 2 entries: audit_archive/ and vikunja_project_ids.yaml. This is the correct post-E8 state. Any count other than 2 → HARD STOP.

The unpause function is resume_fleet() — NOT unpause_fleet(). Calling unpause_fleet() raises AttributeError. sys.path.insert(0, r'C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform') is required before import when running as a subprocess.

Item 6.4 scope is limited to: read pyproject.toml, add authors field if absent, verify no other placeholder bits. No other fields added. No version bump. No section reorder. No edits to [tool.pytest.ini_options] or optional-dependencies sections.
Item 6.5 sweep is read-only. If non-empty: HARD STOP, enumerate files, await Guide-#10 disposition. EA-11 does NOT relocate any BlarAI/docs/ file without Guide-#10 authorization.

A33 standing workaround: complete_task is SUSPENDED. All closes use Option B: get_task → preserve title/description/priority → update_task(task_id, title=t, description=d, priority=p, done=True). done=True and title must both be explicit in every close call.

Explicit-add discipline throughout Phase 2: git add specifies exact filenames only. git add . and git add -A are never used. git diff --staged is run before each commit to verify only the expected file(s) are staged.

Standing artifacts are untouched: the 9 .claude/agents/*.md ' D' (unstaged deletions) on BlarAI, and the 2 stale flag files on devplatform. Explicit-add discipline ensures they are never staged. No remediation in Phase 2.

The Phase 2 Vikunja tracking task is created in Project 10 (DevPlatform-Meta) at Step 0.5, before the fleet pause. It is closed at Post-Flight via Option B (update_task + done=True). The tracking task ID is captured immediately after creation and referenced in all comments.

step.name: Close Phase 2 Vikunja tracking task
step.instruction: Before unpausing, close the Phase 2 tracking task via Option B (A33 workaround). Do NOT call complete_task.
step.procedure: 1. get_task(task_id) — capture title, description, priority from the created task. 2. update_task(task_id, title=<captured-title>, description=<captured-description>, priority=<captured-priority>, done=True) 3. Verify: get_task(task_id) → done=True, description preserved, priority preserved.

step.name: Unpause fleet
step.timing: LAST action before emitting close report
step.command: python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, r'C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform'); from tools.autonomy_budget import state; state.resume_fleet(updated_by='ea_code', path='C:/Users/mrbla/devplatform/tools/autonomy_budget/state.json')"

commit.message: chore(ops): unpause fleet -- Stage 6 Phase 2 items 6.4+6.5 -- EA-11 done
commit.constraint: git add tools/autonomy_budget/state.json — no other files

step.function_name_warning: resume_fleet() — NOT unpause_fleet(). Calling unpause_fleet() raises AttributeError.

exit_criteria.criterion: Pre-Flight Step 0 4-check verification PASS at session boot (after any Guide-#10 dispositions on check failures).
Pre-Flight Step 1 pause commit landed on devplatform main. Verification: git -C C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform log --oneline -4 | grep "pause fleet"

Item 6.4 result documented: (a) If edit made: devplatform pyproject.toml has authors field; commit on devplatform main. Verification: git -C C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform show <commit> -- pyproject.toml (b) If pre-satisfied: close report notes pre-existing authors field; no commit 2 in chain.
Item 6.5 result documented: (a) PASS path: close report confirms empty sweep output. (b) HARD STOP path: close report lists matched files; Guide-#10 disposition pending.
STATUS.md E10 evolution entry appended AND Stage 6 table row updated (if 6.5 PASS path). BlarAI commit on main. Verification: git -C C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI show <commit> --stat
Phase 2 Vikunja tracking task created in Project 10 AND closed via Option B (done=True, description preserved). Verification: mcp__vikunja__get_task(task_id) → done=true.
Post-Flight unpause commit landed on devplatform main; state.json fleet_paused=False. Verification: git -C C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform log --oneline -1 | grep "unpause fleet"

EA-11 emits Phase 2 close report listing: all commit SHAs, Vikunja tracking task ID, 6.4 result, 6.5 result, E10 entry text, exit-criteria checklist. The close report is the final output before Guide-#10 cross-verification.

close_protocol.step: Verify all exit criteria EC1–EC8 against actual disk/Vikunja state.

Emit Phase 2 close report to Guide-#10 (via LA). Structure: - TL;DR (2–3 sentences) - Commit table (repo / SHA / subject / files) - Vikunja mutations (tracking task ID / status / comment IDs) - Item 6.4 result (edit made or pre-satisfied; diff summary) - Item 6.5 result (PASS / HARD STOP + file list) - E10 entry text as committed - Exit-criteria checklist EC1–EC8 - HARD STOP items if any (with full details for Guide-#10 disposition)

Stand by for Guide-#10 APPROVED verdict. Fleet is unpaused; cron-triggered fleet roles may resume. Phase 3 (HIGH-risk hardening tickets: A/X/II/VV) requires a new dispatch from Guide-#10 before EA-12 spawn.

guide_verification.cmd: mcp__vikunja__project_summary (expect Project 10: 38 total / 14 done / 24 open — create adds +1 total/+1 open, close converts to done; net: +1 total, +1 done, open unchanged at 24)
